description: Binary size thresholds for Glassbox project

glassbox-cli.description: Main CLI binary for Glassbox trace viewer

notes: Thresholds are set based on typical Rust binary sizes with Soroban SDK dependencies
warn_threshold_percent triggers a warning when size exceeds this percentage of max_size_bytes
Adjust thresholds as needed based on actual baseline measurements
Size measurements are for release builds with default optimizations
